name: D&D SRD Demo Pack
description: A demonstration dataset drawn from the D&D 5e SRD and common fantasy tropes: 24 hirelings, 64 items, and 16 tasks. The matching tag registry skeleton lives in demo_tag_registry.yml. Tag grammar follows [modifier,]segment[:segment...][=value].

agents.name: VETERAN GUARD
agents.description: Seasoned melee fighter, steady under pressure.

agents.name: HEDGE WIZARD
agents.description: Self-taught spellcaster with a knack for utility magic.

agents.name: ELVEN SCOUT
agents.description: Quiet tracker who ranges far ahead of the company.

agents.name: FIELD MEDIC
agents.description: Keeps the company on its feet through any campaign.

agents.name: DAY LABORER
agents.description: Strong back, willing hands. Cheap and reliable.

agents.name: DWARVEN SMITH
agents.description: Master of the forge; repairs and forges arms and armor.

agents.name: HALFLING BURGLAR
agents.description: Light fingers and lighter footsteps. Opens what won't open.

agents.name: WANDERING BARD
agents.description: Gathers rumors and lifts spirits in equal measure.

agents.name: TEMPLE PALADIN
agents.description: Oath-bound knight, a bulwark of faith and steel.

agents.name: GROVE DRUID
agents.description: Keeper of the old ways; speaks for beast and bramble.

agents.name: STREET TOUGH
agents.description: Knuckle-bruiser from the docks. Asks no questions.

agents.name: ARCANE APPRENTICE
agents.description: Eager student of the art, still smudged with chalk.

agents.name: CARAVAN GUIDE
agents.description: Knows every road, ford, and bandit ambush for a hundred miles.

agents.name: GUILD ALCHEMIST
agents.description: Distills potions and poisons alike behind a locked door.

agents.name: SHADOW ASSASSIN
agents.description: A blade in the dark. Expensive, discreet, lethal.

agents.name: DRAGONBORN MERCENARY
agents.description: A towering sellsword whose breath still smolders.

agents.name: CLOISTERED SCHOLAR
agents.description: Pale, patient, and bottomless on matters of history.

agents.name: MARSH HUNTER
agents.description: Trapper and forager who thrives where others sink.

agents.name: WARLOCK BROKER
agents.description: Trades in secrets and pacts. Reads the fine print twice.

agents.name: MOUNTAIN GUARD
agents.description: Stoic dwarf who has held a gate or two in his day.

agents.name: TRAVELING PRIEST
agents.description: Tends the sick and consecrates ground wherever he stops.

agents.name: SORCERER PRODIGY
agents.description: Raw, untrained power crackling beneath the skin.

agents.name: MONASTERY ADEPT
agents.description: Disciplined martial artist, calm as still water.

agents.name: DOCKSIDE COOK
agents.description: Feeds a whole company on a copper and a prayer.

items.name: HEALING POTION
items.description: Restores 2d4+2 hit points when consumed.

items.name: GREATER HEALING POTION
items.description: Restores 4d4+4 hit points when consumed.

items.name: POTION OF FIRE RESISTANCE
items.description: Grants resistance to fire damage for one hour.

items.name: ANTITOXIN
items.description: Advantage on saving throws against poison for one hour.

items.name: OIL OF SLIPPERINESS
items.description: Coats a creature or surface, mimicking grease.

items.name: DAGGER
items.description: A simple finesse blade, easily concealed.

items.name: SHORTSWORD
items.description: A light, versatile blade favored by scouts.

items.name: LONGSWORD
items.description: The reliable martial blade of soldiers everywhere.

items.name: GREATAXE
items.description: A brutal two-handed axe. Subtlety not included.

items.name: WARHAMMER
items.description: A heavy hammer that caves shields and skulls alike.

items.name: LONGBOW
items.description: A tall bow with deadly reach in skilled hands.

items.name: SHORTBOW
items.description: A compact bow for hunting and skirmishing.

items.name: LIGHT CROSSBOW
items.description: Simple to load, simpler to aim.

items.name: QUARTERSTAFF
items.description: A stout length of oak. Cheap and dependable.

items.name: SPEAR
items.description: A versatile thrown or thrusting weapon.

items.name: ARROWS (20)
items.description: A bundle of twenty fletched arrows.

items.name: CROSSBOW BOLTS (20)
items.description: Twenty iron-tipped bolts.

items.name: PADDED ARMOR
items.description: Quilted layers offering minimal protection.

items.name: LEATHER ARMOR
items.description: Supple boiled leather, quiet and light.

items.name: CHAIN SHIRT
items.description: A mail shirt worn beneath clothes.

items.name: CHAIN MAIL
items.description: Interlocking iron rings providing solid protection.

items.name: PLATE ARMOR
items.description: Shaped steel plates covering the whole body.

items.name: SHIELD
items.description: A sturdy wooden shield banded with iron.

items.name: ROPE (50 FT)
items.description: Fifty feet of sturdy hempen rope.

items.name: GRAPPLING HOOK
items.description: An iron hook for scaling walls and cliffs.

items.name: RATIONS
items.description: Dried trail food for a day.

items.name: TORCH
items.description: Burns for about an hour, shedding bright light.

items.name: LANTERN
items.description: A hooded lantern that casts a steady beam.

items.name: BEDROLL
items.description: Warm enough for a night under the stars.

items.name: WATERSKIN
items.description: Holds four pints of water or wine.

items.name: TINDERBOX
items.description: Flint, steel, and tinder for starting fires.

items.name: CALTROPS
items.description: Scattered iron spikes to slow pursuers.

items.name: MANACLES
items.description: Iron restraints for captured quarry.

items.name: THIEVES' TOOLS
items.description: Picks and probes for locks and traps.

items.name: HEALER'S KIT
items.description: Bandages, salves, and splints for ten uses.

items.name: SMITH'S TOOLS
items.description: Hammer, tongs, and files for metalwork.

items.name: ALCHEMIST'S SUPPLIES
items.description: Retorts, reagents, and glassware.

items.name: SCHOLAR'S TOOLS
items.description: Reference texts and instruments for academic work.

items.name: NAVIGATOR'S TOOLS
items.description: Charts, compass, and sextant.

items.name: DISGUISE KIT
items.description: Cosmetics and props for assuming another face.

items.name: LUTE
items.description: A finely strung instrument for the road.

items.name: SPELLBOOK
items.description: A wizard's grimoire of inscribed spells.

items.name: SCROLL OF IDENTIFY
items.description: Reveals the properties of a magic item.

items.name: SCROLL OF FIREBALL
items.description: Unleashes a roaring sphere of flame.

items.name: HOLY SYMBOL
items.description: An emblem of faith and a divine focus.

items.name: WAND OF MAGIC MISSILE
items.description: Looses unerring bolts of force. 7 charges.

items.name: STAFF OF HEALING
items.description: Channels restorative magic. 10 charges.

items.name: RING OF PROTECTION
items.description: A band that wards its wearer from harm.

items.name: CLOAK OF ELVENKIND
items.description: Shimmering cloth that blurs its wearer from sight.

items.name: BOOTS OF STRIDING
items.description: Tireless boots that quicken every step.

items.name: BAG OF HOLDING
items.description: An extradimensional sack of vast capacity.

items.name: AMULET OF HEALTH
items.description: Bolsters the wearer's constitution.

items.name: GOLD COINS
items.description: Standard currency of the realm.

items.name: SILVER COINS
items.description: Ten silver to the gold.

items.name: GEMSTONE
items.description: A cut gem, easy to carry and trade.

items.name: RUBY
items.description: A flawless blood-red ruby.

items.name: GOLD IDOL
items.description: A small idol of solid gold, looted from a ruin.

items.name: SILK BOLT
items.description: A bolt of fine silk for trade.

items.name: SPICE POUCH
items.description: Exotic spices worth their weight in coin.

items.name: DRAGON SCALE
items.description: A reagent prized by armorers and alchemists.

items.name: TROLL BLOOD VIAL
items.description: A regenerative reagent for potion-brewing.

items.name: MOONPETAL HERB
items.description: A pale flower that blooms only by night.

items.name: IRON INGOT
items.description: Refined iron ready for the forge.

items.name: TANGLEFOOT BAG
items.description: Bursts into sticky resin, miring whatever it strikes.

tasks.name: CLEAR THE CELLAR
tasks.description: Drive the vermin from the guild cellar.

tasks.name: ESCORT CARAVAN
tasks.description: Guard a merchant caravan to the next town.

tasks.name: GATHER HERBS
tasks.description: Collect medicinal herbs from the nearby woods.

tasks.name: RESEARCH RITUAL
tasks.description: Decipher a recovered ritual from the archives.

tasks.name: CLEAR THE CRYPT
tasks.description: Cleanse an old crypt of its restless dead.

tasks.name: PICK THE VAULT
tasks.description: Open the sealed vault beneath the counting-house.

tasks.name: FORGE A BLADE
tasks.description: Craft a fine sword to a patron's exacting specs.

tasks.name: BREW POTIONS
tasks.description: Distill a batch of healing draughts for the guild.

tasks.name: NEGOTIATE TREATY
tasks.description: Broker peace between two feuding houses.

tasks.name: SCOUT THE PASS
tasks.description: Map the mountain pass and report on its dangers.

tasks.name: HUNT THE BEAST
tasks.description: Track and slay the monster preying on the village.

tasks.name: INFILTRATE THE MANOR
tasks.description: Slip into the noble's manor and lift a sealed letter.

tasks.name: TRANSCRIBE TOMES
tasks.description: Copy a crumbling library of arcane lore before it rots.

tasks.name: GUARD THE GATE
tasks.description: Hold the city gate through the long watch.

tasks.name: DELVE THE DUNGEON
tasks.description: Plumb the lost dungeon for its hidden treasures.

tasks.name: PERFORM AT COURT
tasks.description: Entertain the court and curry favor for the guild.
